steps.title: Track the contrast
steps.content: Engineers warned against multiple track widths, but regional officials still failed to agree on a single-width system. The transition must show that the failure happened despite the warning.

steps.title: Choose the contrast word
steps.content: Choice A signals similarity, which is wrong. Choice B means despite that and fits the contrast between the warning and officials' failure. Choice C wrongly signals cause. Choice D wrongly signals restatement. The answer is B.
